summary: Tested new categories endpoint and fallback pricing feature. All backend tests passed (17/17). Frontend Subscribe page correctly displays dynamic categories from DB and shows proper fallback pricing when tier is selected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Categories endpoint at GET /api/contracts/categories returns joined data from category + category_business_mapping tables. Territory pricing with fallback at POST /api/contracts/territory-pricing accepts category_type parameter and uses category_business_mapping as fallback when no territory-specific price exists. Frontend tier mapping: small-standard=small, small-premium=medium, large-full=large.
verified_features: GET /api/contracts/categories returns 4 categories with pricing by type
Pest Control Service pricing: small=$180, medium=$400, large=$850
Well & Septic Co. pricing: small=$250, medium=$500, large=$1000
Frontend industry dropdown loads categories from DB dynamically
Invoice shows correct per-county pricing with tier-based fallback
Tier selection triggers price re-fetch with category_type
